hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$status = git -C $PWD status --porcelain 2>$null; $unpushed = git -C $PWD log '@{u}..' --oneline 2>$null; if ($status -or $unpushed) { Write-Host ''; Write-Host '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host '  未コミット・未プッシュの変更があります' -ForegroundColor Yellow; if ($status) { Write-Host '  [未コミット]' -ForegroundColor Red; $status | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "    $_" } }; if ($unpushed) { Write-Host '  [未プッシュ]' -ForegroundColor Cyan; $unpushed | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "    $_" } }; Write-Host '  → git add / commit / push を忘れずに' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━' -ForegroundColor Yellow }"
